raw_user_request: Build a bot that helps a support team triage tickets
concrete_goal: Build a support triage bot for support agents to classify incoming tickets, suggest priority, surface missing customer context, and route urgent issues to the right queue.
success_criteria: Support agents can submit a ticket summary and receive a priority, category, routing queue, and missing-context prompt.
The bot shows ticket status, confidence, escalation reason, empty state, validation state, and saved triage history.
scope_in: Single-page support bot interaction flow with local client-side ticket triage state.
scope_out: Production help desk integrations, external AI calls, authentication, billing, and deployment.
assumptions: Local deterministic sample responses are sufficient for the prototype.
implementation_constraints: Do not add paid services or external support system integrations.

scenario_flows.name: Triage a support ticket
preconditions: The support bot workspace is open with sample ticket categories.
steps: Enter a customer ticket summary with product area and impact.
Run triage and review the priority, category, routing queue, and missing-context prompt.
scenario_flows.expected_result: The bot returns a triage recommendation with visible confidence, status, escalation reason, and saved ticket history.
failure_or_edge_cases: Missing ticket summary shows validation and disables triage.
Low-confidence triage shows a human-review state with escalation guidance.

verification_matrix.behavior_check: Check triage, validation, low-confidence escalation, saved history, and responsive behavior.

acceptance_evidence_plan: Desktop and mobile screenshots plus behavior, accessibility, and state coverage for the support bot ticket triage workflow.
iteration_policy: Rework until the review score reaches the quality threshold.

delegation_plan_seed.objective: Build the support ticket triage bot workspace.
